wordmark.purpose: 'SUITS U' only — the single use of Arges Condensed, in nav and footer.

hero.purpose: Landing headline over full-bleed photography. The loudest type on the site.

heading.purpose: All section titles. Roman Arges, uppercase, 700, 2px tracking.

body.purpose: Section copy and descriptions in Roboto Flex. Hold to 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Buttons, placeholders, store names, badges. Uppercase, short strings only.

motion.name: state-opacity
motion.purpose: Hover drops interactive elements to opacity 0.8 — the only resting-state transition.

motion.name: focus-ring
motion.purpose: Keyboard focus indicator on all interactive elements.

components.name: Secondary Button (White)
components.description: The workhorse outline CTA on black surfaces.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: transparent; color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #ffffff; border-radius: 0; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; font-family: 'Roboto Flex', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.5; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.2s; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { opacity: 0.8; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ffffff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button (Cream)
components.description: Outline CTA in the cream accent — used on black across product sections.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary-cream { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: transparent; color: #f8f6ea; border: 1px solid #f8f6ea; border-radius: 0; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; font-family: 'Roboto Flex', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.5; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.2s; } .ds-btn-secondary-cream:hover { opacity: 0.8; } .ds-btn-secondary-cream:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f8f6ea; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Solid white fill, black text — emphasized store / home-location button.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #ffffff; color: #000000; border: 1px solid #ffffff; border-radius: 0; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; font-family: 'Roboto Flex', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.5; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.8; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ffffff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Email Input
components.description: Newsletter email field — square, white fill, uppercase placeholder.
components.css: .ds-input-email { width: 100%; background: #ffffff; color: #000000; border: 1px solid #ffffff; border-radius: 0; padding: 0.75rem; font-family: 'Roboto Flex', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-input-email::placeholder { text-transform: uppercase; color: #9ca3af; } .ds-input-email:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ffffff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Section Heading
components.description: Uppercase Roman Arges section title with the signature 2px tracking.
components.css: .ds-heading { margin: 0; color: #ffffff; font-family: 'Arges', 'Anton', Impact, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 6vw, 3.75rem); line-height: 1.2; letter-spacing: 0.125rem; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Wordmark
components.description: The brand logotype — the only use of Arges Condensed.
components.css: .ds-wordmark { color: #ffffff; font-family: 'Arges Condensed', 'Arges', 'Anton', Impact, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 3.125rem; line-height: 0.8; letter-spacing: 0; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Showcase Card
components.description: The signature inverted card — dark type on Soft Stone, three-point layout.
components.html:
Custom Suits

Elevating your corporate wardrobe

Shop now
components.css: .ds-showcase { position: relative; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between; background: #f4f4f4; color: #000000; border-radius: 0; padding: 3rem; min-height: 24rem; aspect-ratio: 752 / 1010; } .ds-showcase-title { margin: 0; font-family: 'Arges', 'Anton', Impact, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 3.75rem; line-height: 1.2; text-transform: uppercase; max-width: 7.5rem; } .ds-showcase-foot { display: flex; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1.5rem; } .ds-showcase-sub { margin: 0; font-family: 'Roboto Flex', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.5; } .ds-showcase-link { font-family: 'Roboto Flex', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.5; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: underline; color: #000000; white-space: nowrap; }

narrative.overview: Suit U treats the screen as a black gallery wall and each garment photograph as the framed work hung on it. The surface is near-total black, edge to edge, and the photography is the only thing allowed to be loud. Cream is not a background color here, it is the studio backdrop the suits were shot against, bleeding through the edges of the frames. The interface is deliberately architectural rather than minimal-by-timidity: every edge is a true 90° corner, every divider a 1px hairline, every button a flat outlined rectangle. This system explicitly rejects generic ecommerce — no rounded cards with drop shadows, no gradient flourishes, no motion that competes with shopping.
keyCharacteristics: Black gallery wall as the dominant, near-universal surface.
Full-bleed photography is the hero; the UI recedes around it.
Square corners everywhere (0px radius), no exceptions.
Flat by default: depth comes from photo-against-black contrast, never shadows.
Two-register Arges typography (Condensed wordmark + Roman headings), uppercase, structural.
Cream as a single warm accent, read as studio backdrop, never as a body fill.

rules.name: The Gallery Wall Rule
rules.body: Black is the default surface and the page returns to it between every section. Light surfaces (Soft Stone, Gallery Charcoal) are deliberate exceptions that frame a specific moment, never the resting state.

rules.name: The Cream-Is-Backdrop Rule
rules.body: Cream appears as accent borders, label text on black, and the photographic studio backdrop. It is forbidden as a large body background — the warm-paper landing-page move is exactly what this brand is not.

rules.name: The Two-Width Rule
rules.body: Condensed Arges is the wordmark and nothing else. Roman Arges is every other heading. Never swap them; the Condensed face on a section heading reads as a different brand.

rules.name: The 2px Heading Rule
rules.body: Section headings always carry letter-spacing: 0.125rem (2px). It is what separates an Arges heading from a generic uppercase sans.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Surfaces never lift with shadow. If a region needs to separate from the black wall, it changes value (to Charcoal or Stone) or is bounded by a 1px hairline, never blurred elevation.

dos: Do keep black (#000000) as the default surface and return to it between sections (the Gallery Wall Rule).
Do let full-bleed photography lead every section; the garment is the hero, the UI recedes.
Do use square corners (0px radius) on every button, card, input, and image tile, without exception.
Do set section headings in Roman Arges, uppercase, 700, with letter-spacing: 0.125rem (the 2px Heading Rule).
Do reserve Arges Condensed for the 'SUITS U' wordmark only (the Two-Width Rule).
Do keep cream as accent, border, label, and studio backdrop only.
Do convey depth through value blocking and 1px hairlines, never shadow.
Do give product images priority / correct sizes and meaningful alt text; empty alt only for the decorative hero backdrop.
donts: Don't ship generic ecommerce: no rounded cards, drop shadows, or template product grids.
Don't use cream as a large body background — the warm-paper / cream landing-page move is exactly this brand's anti-reference.
Don't put Arges Condensed on a section heading, or omit the 2px tracking; both read as a different, lesser brand.
Don't add gradients, glassmorphism, or decorative effects over the photography.
Don't use motion that competes with shopping; animation stays at opacity/state level and respects prefers-reduced-motion.
Don't use vague promotional copy or buzzwords; speak to fit, alteration, occasion, and wardrobe upgrade specifically.
Don't let any heading overflow its container; test the uppercase Arges copy at every breakpoint.
Don't drop body or placeholder text below WCAG AA contrast; Placeholder Grey is for placeholders, never body copy.
